description: Log in to Odoo Inventory as admin/admin. You are managing service vehicles represented as internal locations under WH/Stock. Restock 'Van A' (WH/Stock/Van A) from WH/Stock with 4 units of 'Honeywell TH6220U2000 Thermostat', 6 units of 'Titan 35/5 MFD Dual Capacitor', and 3 units of 'Supco SPP6 Hard Start Kit'. Decommission 'Van B' (WH/Stock/Van B) by transferring all its current stock back to WH/Stock and archiving the location. Use internal transfers for all movements to ensure proper auditing; do not use inventory adjustments.
